DISCOVERY, 302, DEFENDANTS GARY SHARP AND ARROW CHECKER CAB INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RECORDS FROM SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR AT THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RECORDS FROM SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT (CAL. EVID. CODE 1043) FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT

DISCOVERY, 302, DEFENDANTS GARY SHARP AND ARROW CHECKER CAB INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RECORDS FROM SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 4, 2015 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, DISCOVERY TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 25, 2015, AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

DISCOVERY 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS GARY SHARP, ARROW CHECKER CAB INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RECORDS FROM SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTIES INCORRECTLY FILED THEIR MOTION WHICH IS IN SUBSTANCE A PITCHESS MOTION MADE PURSUANT TO EVIDENCE CODE 1043 IN DEPARTMENT 302. THE MOVING PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO FILE THEIR MOTION WITH JUDGE CROMPTON IN DEPARTMENT 22 AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE, 850 BRYANT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103. CIVIL PITCHESS MOTIONS ARE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 22 AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE EVERY WEDNESDAY AT 1:30 P.M. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED. (302)

Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS GARY SHARP, ARROW CHECKER CAB INC.'S Motion To Compel Records From San Francisco Police Department is OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTIES INCORRECTLY FILED THEIR MOTION WHICH IS IN SUBSTANCE A PITCHESS MOTION MADE PURSUANT TO EVIDENCE CODE 1043 IN DEPARTMENT 302. THE MOVING PARTIES ARE DIRECTED TO FILE THEIR MOTION WITH JUDGE CROMPTON IN DEPARTMENT 22 AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE, 850 BRYANT STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103. CIVIL PITCHESS MOTIONS ARE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 22 AT THE HALL OF JUSTICE EVERY WEDNESDAY AT 1:30 P.M. Judge Pro Tem: Mark Schreiber, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. (302)
